raw.subject: Your Lynchburg page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

You recently updated your profile picture, which looks great by the way.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for people in Lynchburg to find you when they need roadside assistance.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that could help: an emergency call CTA, a list of services you offer, and a map of the areas you serve.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/dma-roadside-assistance-lynchburg

I'd love to discuss how a simple website could help you reach more customers in Lynchburg. I work with local businesses like yours on a flat fee basis. Let's talk soon.
